MHC Assistant Programmer — 5-Week Study Plan
Notification No. 171/2025 · 3 hrs/day · 105 hrs total · Written Exam: Part A – Tamil (50 marks, no negative) & Part B – Technical + Reasoning (70 marks, −0.25 per wrong)

What Changed: 2021 → 2025 Notification

2021 (Not. 17/2021)2025 (Not. 171/2025)
Total Questions150120
Duration180 min150 min
Part AGeneral English (15 marks)Tamil Eligibility Test (50 marks)
Part BGeneral Tamil (15 marks)— merged into Part A —
Part CGK + Numerical Ability + Reasoning + Gen. Intelligence (20)GK & Numerical Ability dropped as named topics
Part D / B4 areas: Networks/OS, App Dev, Web Tech, Software Tools (100)Same 4 + Cloud Computing (new) + Reasoning + Gen. Intelligence (70)
Negative marking−0.25 on Part D only−0.25 on Part B only; Part A has none

Priority Tiers

MasterHTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TamilBiggest mark share + already in progress — study in depth
Solid PassApplication Dev, Networks/OS, Software Tools, ReasoningConcept notes + MCQs — no need to over-study
Recognition OnlyJSON, AJAX, XML, PHP, Python, Java, Cloud Computing, General IntelligenceJust enough for MCQs: definitions, syntax recall, key terms
Week 1 — Web Foundations
Day 1-3HTML5 (finish) + CSS32.5h/day
Day 4-6JavaScript core: variables, functions, DOM, events2.5h/day
DailyTamil grammar & comprehension0.5h/day
Day 7Review + MCQ test on Week 13h
Week 2 — Web Wrap-up + Light Topics
Day 8-9JavaScript: arrays, objects, ES6 basics2.5h/day
Day 10JSON: syntax, parsing, vs XML2.5h
Day 11AJAX: XMLHttpRequest, readyState, use cases2.5h
Day 12XML: well-formedness, DTD/Schema basics2.5h
Day 13PHP: syntax, superglobals, basic functions2.5h
DailyTamil practice0.5h/day
Day 14Review + MCQ test on Week 23h
Week 3 — Remaining Languages + App Dev
Day 15-16Python: basic syntax, data types (concept-level)2.5h/day
Day 17-18Java: OOP concepts2.5h/day
Day 19-20Application Development: SDLC, DFD, flowcharts, testing types2.5h/day
DailyTamil practice0.5h/day
Day 21Review + MCQ test on Week 33h
Week 4 — Networks, Software Tools, Cloud Intro
Day 22-23Networks & OS: LAN/WAN/OSI/Linux basics2.5h/day
Day 24-25Software Tools: DBMS, SQL overview, ER diagrams, LMS/CMS/DMS2.5h/day
Day 26-28Cloud Computing Pt.1: basics, IaaS/PaaS/SaaS, virtualization2.5h/day
DailyTamil + start Reasoning practice0.5h/day
Day 28Quick MCQ check1h
Week 5 — Cloud Finish, Reasoning/GI, Tamil Push, Mocks
Day 29-30Cloud Computing Pt.2: storage, security, federation (light)2.5h/day
Day 31-32Analytical/Reasoning + General Intelligence2.5h/day
Day 33Tamil intensive (target weakest accumulated area)3h
Day 34-35Full-length timed mocks (150 min) + review wrong answers only3h/day
Default daily rhythm: 2.5 hrs → main technical topic (concept notes → MCQs same session) · 0.5 hr → Tamil or Reasoning (rotate, never skip).
If the exam date drops sooner than 5 weeks: cut from the Recognition-only tier first (Python, AJAX, XML, General Intelligence) — protect HTML/CSS/JS/Tamil, your safest scoring ground.
